Item.name: Salo Duk abubuwan da suka faru na Token
Duba Fayil na Yanzu a cikin
Rufe Duk Sai dai Takardu na Yanzu
Rufe Duk Takardun Takaddun da Aka Fita AMMA
Mayar da Fayil ɗin da aka Rufe Kwanan nan
Layin Layi Lex.Hawan Yin watsi da Harka
Layin Layi Lex.Saukowa Rashin Kula da Harka
Tsare-tsare Layi A cikin oda na gida yana hawan
Tsare-tsare Layi A cikin Tsarin Gida yana Saukowa
Rarraba Layuka Ta Tsawon Hawan Hawa
Rarraba Layukan Kamar Yadda Integers suke Haura
Rarraba Layi Kamar Yadda Integers ke Saukowa
Layin Layi Kamar yadda Ma'aunin Decimal (Waƙafi) ke hawa
Rarraba Layukan Kamar Yadda Waƙafi (Waƙafi) Saukowa
Layin Layuka Kamar yadda Ma'aunin Decimal (Dot) ke hawa
Rarraba Layukan Kamar Yadda Dikiyoyi (Dot) suke saukowa
Buɗe Jaka Mai Ƙunshe a cikin Explorer
Yi watsi da Harka Gabaɗayan Kalma
Yi watsi da Harka Gabaɗayan Kalma
Tsallake Yanzu Je zuwa Multi-zaɓi na gaba
Gyara duka biyu da EOL zuwa Sarari
Ajiye Macro da Aka Rikodi A halin yanzu...
Cire Layukan da Ba komai (Dauke da Haruffa Marubuciya)
Saka Blank Line Sama Na Yanzu
Saka Blank Line A Kasa Na Yanzu
Kwafi Layukan da aka yiwa alama
Manna zuwa (Maye gurbin) Layukan da aka yiwa alama
Cire Layukan da Ba Masu Alama ba
Aiki tare da gungurawa a kwance
Mayar da hankali kan Wani Ra'ayi
Buɗe Fayil ɗin Harshen Ƙa'idar Mai Amfani...
Tarin Ma'anar Harsunan Mai Amfani da Nextpad++
Nextpad++ Manual mai amfani ta kan layi
Ma'auni na Aiki na baya Alamu
Ma'auni na Aiki Alamu na gaba
Ba komai Jerin Fayilolin Kwanan nan
Buɗe Jaka Mai Ƙunshe a cikin Explorer
Buɗe Jaka Mai Ƙunshe a cikin cmd
Buɗe Jaka Mai Ƙunshe A Matsayin Wurin Aiki
Sauya Duk a cikin Duk Takardun Buɗe
Nemo Duk Cikin Duk Takardun Buɗe
Nemo Duk a cikin Takardun Yanzu
Ba za ku iya wuce gaba ba:

MD5FromFilesDlg.title: Ƙirƙirar narkar da MD5 daga fayiloli

Item.name: Zaɓi fayiloli don samar da MD5...
Bi da kowane layi a matsayin kirtani daban
Zaɓi fayiloli don samar da SHA-256...
Bi da kowane layi azaman keɓaɓɓen kirtani

SHA1FromFilesDlg.title: Ƙirƙirar narkar da SHA-1 daga fayiloli

Item.name: Zaɓi fayiloli don samar da SHA-1...
Bi da kowane layi a matsayin kirtani daban
Zaɓi fayiloli don samar da SHA-512...
Bi da kowane layi a matsayin kirtani daban
Ƙaddamar da launi na gaba don kowane salo
Ƙaddamar da launi na baya don kowane salo
Tilasta zaɓin font ga kowane salo
Tilasta girman girman font ga kowane salo
Ƙarfafa zaɓi mai ƙarfi don kowane salo
Tilasta zaɓin rubutun ga kowane salo
Ƙaddamar da zaɓi don kowane salo

ConflictInfoOk.name: Babu cin karo da gajeriyar hanya don wannan abun.

Item.name: Bude babban fayil mai ƙunshe a cikin Explorer
Bude babban fayil mai ƙunshe a cikin Command Prompt
Mayar da Fayil ɗin da aka Rufe Kwanan nan
Salo duk ta amfani da salo na farko
Salo duk ta amfani da salo na biyu
Salo duk ta amfani da salo na 3
Salo duk ta amfani da salo na hudu
Salo duk ta amfani da salo na 5
Salo na daya ta amfani da salo na farko
Salo na daya ta amfani da salo na biyu
Salo na daya ta hanyar amfani da salo na uku
Salo na daya ta hanyar amfani da salo na hudu
Salo na daya ta hanyar amfani da salo na 5
Salo na baya na salo na farko
Salo na baya na salo na biyu
Salo na baya na salo na uku
Salo na baya na salo na hudu
Salo na baya na salo na 5
Salon da ya gabata na Find Mark style
Salo Na Gaba Na Salo Na Farko
Salo Na Gaba Na Salo Na Biyu
Salo Na Gaba Na Salo Na Uku
Salo Na Gaba Na Salo Na Hudu
Salo Na Gaba Na Salo Na Biyar
Salo na gaba na Nemo salon Mark
Kwafi Salon Rubutun Salo Na Farko
Kwafi Salon Rubutun Salo Na Biyu
Kwafi Salon Rubutu Na Salo Na Uku
Kwafi Salon Rubutun Salo Na Hudu
Kwafi Salon Rubutun Salo Na Biyar
Kwafi Salon Rubutun Nemo Salon Alama
Duba fayil na yanzu a Firefox
Duba fayil na yanzu a cikin Chrome
Duba fayil na yanzu a cikin IE
Duba fayil na yanzu a Edge
Canja zuwa takardar da ta gabata
Canja zuwa Jaka azaman Wurin Aiki
Tsare da Suna A zuwa Z
Tsara da Sunan Z zuwa A
Tsara Ta Hanyar A zuwa Z
Tsara ta Hanyar Z zuwa A
Tsara ta Nau'in Z zuwa A
Tsare ta hanyar Tsawon Abun ciki yana Hauwa
Tsare ta hanyar Tsawon Abun ciki yana saukowa
Wannan zai cire gajeriyar hanya daga wannan umarni
Taimakon Harsunan Mai Amfani akan layi
Lanƙwasa cikin salo na lamba 2 (masu rarrabawa da ake buƙata)
Boye (amfani da maɓallin Alt ko F10 don kunnawa)
Zana mashaya mai launi akan shafin aiki
Nuna maɓallan akan shafuka marasa aiki
Danna sau biyu don rufe daftarin aiki
Fita a kusa da shafin karshe
Sanya umarnin nadawa/bayyana matakin yanzu ana iya jujjuyawa
Kashe fasalin gungurawa na ci gaba saboda matsalar taɓarɓarewa
Kunna gungurawa sama da layin ƙarshe
Ci gaba da zaɓi lokacin danna dama a waje na zaɓi
Kunna Kwafi/Yanke Layi ba tare da zaɓi ba
Aiwatar da launi na al'ada zuwa zaɓaɓɓen rubutun gaba
Kunna Zaɓin Rukunin Rubuce-rubucen zuwa Gyarawa da yawa
Aiwatar da saitunan bayyanar zuwa C0, C1 Unicode EOL
Hana halayen sarrafawa (lambar C0) buga cikin daftarin aiki
UTF-16 Babban Endian tare da BOM
UTF-16 Ƙananan Endian tare da BOM
Koyaushe buɗe sabon daftarin aiki ƙari a farawa
Yi amfani da layin farko na daftarin aiki azaman sunan shafin mara taken
Tuna littafin da aka yi amfani da shi na ƙarshe
Bude duk fayilolin babban fayil maimakon ƙaddamar da Jaka azaman Wurin aiki akan sauke babban fayil
Da fatan za a fita daga Nextpad++ kuma sake kunna Nextpad++ a yanayin Mai gudanarwa don amfani da wannan fasalin.
Sanya menu na harshe mai ƙarfi
Bi da koma baya a matsayin halin tserewa ga SQL
Yi amfani da ƙima ta asali
Maɓallin sararin baya baya ɓoyewa maimakon cire sarari ɗaya
Salo Duk abubuwan da suka faru na Token
Yi amfani da Nemo saitunan maganganu
Yi amfani da rubutu guda ɗaya a Nemo maganganu (Bukatar sake kunna Nextpad++)
Nemo maganganu yana buɗewa bayan binciken da ke fitowa zuwa taga sakamako
Tabbatar da Sauya Duk a cikin Duk Takardun Buɗe
Sauya: Kar a matsa zuwa abin da ke biyo baya
Tagan sakamakon bincike: nuna shigarwa ɗaya kawai akan kowane layin da aka samo idan zai yiwu
Cika Filin Nemo tare da Zaɓin Rubutun
Zaɓi Kalma Ƙarƙashin Kulawa lokacin da Ba'a Zaɓan Komai
Mafi qarancin Girma don dubawa ta atomatik "A cikin zaɓi":
Cika Nemo Filin Fayilolin Fayiloli Dangane da Takardu Mai Aiki
: Matsakaicin Haruffa don Cika Filin Neman Kai tsaye daga Zaɓi
Kada ku duba a lokacin ƙaddamarwa
Kunna hoton zaman da kuma madadin lokaci-lokaci
Haɓaka madadin akan gyare-gyare a kowane
Tuna zaman yau don ƙaddamarwa na gaba
Tuna fayilolin da ba za su iya shiga ba daga zaman da ya gabata
Kunna cikawa ta atomatik akan kowane shigarwa
Yi lissafin kammalawa ta atomatik a takaice
Alamomin aiki suna nuni akan shigarwa
Bude zama a cikin sabon misali (kuma ajiye zaman ta atomatik lokacin fita)
Koyaushe cikin yanayin misali da yawa
* Gyaran wannan saitin yana buƙatar sake kunna Nextpad++
Juya tsarin lokacin kwanan wata (gajerun dogon tsari)
Tuna yanayin panel (panel yana buɗewa) a wasu lokuta (yanayin misali da yawa) ko lokacin amfani da sigar layin umarni [-nosession]
Saitunan zaɓi mai iyaka (Ctrl + Mouse danna sau biyu)
Yi amfani da tsohuwar lissafin haruffan Kalma kamar yadda yake
Ƙara halin ku a matsayin ɓangaren kalma (kada ku zabe shi sai kun san me kuke yi)
Kunna Babban Ƙuntatawar Fayil (babu nuna alama)
Bada hanyar haɗin yanar gizon URL
Mayar da gargaɗi lokacin buɗe fayilolin ≥2GB
Saita hanyar wurin girgijen ku anan:
Saitunan hanyar haɗin da ake dannawa

Element.name: Kunna duk fayilolin da aka buɗe

Item.name: Gungura zuwa layi na ƙarshe bayan sabuntawa
Nuna sunan fayil kawai a mashaya take
Ganowa ta atomatik shigar da haruffa
Bincika a cikin layukan da aka samo kawai

Shin kun tabbata kuna son adana duk takaddun da aka gyara?
Zaɓi "Koyaushe eh" idan ba kwa son sake ganin wannan maganganun. Kuna iya sake kunna wannan maganganun a cikin Zaɓuɓɓuka daga baya.
Kwafi bayanin gyara kuskure zuwa allo
Babu ma'ajiyar git\nYi amfani da Binciko don buɗe wurin ajiya.
Zaɓi babban fayil ɗin ajiya na git
Kuskuren da ba a sani ba
Fayil ɗin zaman da aka zaɓa ya ƙunshi babu shafuka.
Ba a samo fayil ɗin ba
Yi rikodin macro da farko ta amfani da Fara Rikodi.
Nuna cikakken hanyar fayil a mashaya take
Babu cin karo da gajeriyar hanya don wannan abun.
Sake kunna aikace-aikacen don loda plugins ɗin da aka shigar.
Har Yanzu Ba a Aiwatar da
Wannan zai share fayilolin plugin ɗin.
Macro na yanzu da aka rubuta
Yi rikodin kuma ajiye macro tukuna.
Sunan umarni don menu na Run
Alama rubutu an kwafi zuwa allo.
Babu rubutu mai alama don kwafa.
Sauya a cikin Ayyuka: Har yanzu ba a haɗa ba.
Nemo a cikin Ayyuka: Har yanzu ba a haɗa shi zuwa jerin fayil ɗin Panel Panel ba.
Kwafi/yanke layi ba tare da zaɓi ba
Mai haskakawa mai hankali: shari'ar wasa
Haske mai wayo: gabaɗayan kalma kawai
Danna sau biyu don rufe shafin
Nuna shafuka a layuka da yawa
Tuna ganin panel a duk zaman
Ci gaba da shigar da fayil ba ya nan a cikin zama
Tabbatar da Sauya Duk a buɗaɗɗen takaddun
Sauya: kar a matsa zuwa abin da ya faru na gaba
Yi amfani da rubutu guda ɗaya a Nemo maganganu
Juya tsarin kwanan wata/lokaci na tsoho
Yi amfani da masu fassarori na tushen aikin XML
Zaɓi fayil ɗin XML na Nextpad++ don amfani
Dole ne ƙimar kewa ta zama 0-255 kuma farawa dole ne <= ƙarewa.
mahallinMenu.xml Ba a samo shi ba
Sake kunna Nextpad++ don sake farfado da tsohowar mahallinMenu.xml.
Fayil ɗin yana da canje-canje marasa adanawa.Sake loda tare da sabon rikodi zai watsar da su.Ci gaba?
Wurin ajiya na iya zama na sirri.
Ana iya sanya ƙarin fayilolin harshe (.xml) a cikin:
Tsallake amp na yanzu;Je zuwa Multi-zaɓi na gaba

ContextMenuXmlEditWarning.title: Editan mahallin Menu
ContextMenuXmlEditWarning.message: Gyara mahallinMenu.xml yana ba ku damar canza menu na mahallin bugu na Nextpad++. Dole ne ku sake kunna faifan rubutu ++ don fara aiki bayan gyara mahallinMenu.xml.

SaveCurrentModifWarning.title: Ajiye Canjin Yanzu
SaveCurrentModifWarning.message:
Ya kamata ku ajiye canjin na yanzu. Duk gyare-gyaren da aka ajiye ba za a iya soke su ba.
Ci gaba?

LoseUndoAbilityWarning.title: Rasa Gargadin Ƙarfin Ƙarfi
LoseUndoAbilityWarning.message:
Ya kamata ku ajiye canjin na yanzu. Duk gyare-gyaren da aka ajiye ba za a iya soke su ba.
Ci gaba?

CannotMoveDoc.title: Matsar zuwa sabon Nextpad++ Misali
CannotMoveDoc.message: An gyara daftarin aiki, ajiye shi sannan a sake gwadawa.

DocReloadWarning.title: Sake saukewa
DocReloadWarning.message: Shin kun tabbata kuna son sake loda fayil ɗin na yanzu kuma ku rasa sauye-sauyen da aka yi a Nextpad++?

FileLockedWarning.title: Ajiye kasa
FileLockedWarning.message: Da fatan za a duba ko an buɗe wannan fayil ɗin a cikin wani shirin

FileAlreadyOpenedInNpp.message: An riga an buɗe fayil ɗin a cikin Nextpad++.

RenameTabTemporaryNameAlreadyInUse.title: An kasa sake suna
RenameTabTemporaryNameAlreadyInUse.message: An riga an yi amfani da ƙayyadadden suna a wani shafin.

RenameTabTemporaryNameIsEmpty.title: An kasa sake suna
RenameTabTemporaryNameIsEmpty.message: Sunan da aka ƙayyade ba zai iya zama fanko ba, ko kuma ba zai iya ƙunsar sarari(s) ko TAB kawai ba.

NbFileToOpenImportantWarning.title: Adadin fayilolin da za a buɗe ya yi girma da yawa
NbFileToOpenImportantWarning.message: $INT_REPLACE$ files are about to be opened. Are you sure you want to open them?

SettingsOnCloudError.title: Saituna akan Cloud
SettingsOnCloudError.message: Da alama an saita hanyar saitunan akan gajimare akan abin karantawa kawai, ko a babban fayil da ake buƙata dama ga dama don samun damar rubutawa. Za a soke saitunan ku akan gajimare.Da fatan za a sake saita ƙima mai daidaituwa ta hanyar maganganu na zaɓi.

FilePathNotFoundWarning.title: Bude fayil
FilePathNotFoundWarning.message: Fayil ɗin da kuke ƙoƙarin buɗewa babu shi.

SessionFileInvalidError.title: An kasa Loda Zama
SessionFileInvalidError.message: Fayil ɗin zama ko dai ya lalace ko baya aiki.

DroppingFolderAsProjectModeWarning.title: Aiki mara inganci
DroppingFolderAsProjectModeWarning.message: Zaku iya sauke fayiloli ko manyan fayiloli kawai amma ba duka biyu ba, saboda kuna cikin zubar da Jaka azaman yanayin aikin. Dole ne ku kunna "Buɗe duk fayiloli na babban fayil maimakon ƙaddamar da Jaka azaman Wurin aiki akan sauke babban fayil" a cikin sashin "Default Directory" na maganganun Zaɓuɓɓuka don sa wannan aikin yayi aiki.

SortingError.title: Kuskuren Rarraba
SortingError.message: An kasa yin rarrabuwar lambobi saboda layin $INT_REPLACE$.

SortLocaleMultiple.title: Ba a yi tsari ba
SortLocaleMultiple.message: Ba a tallafawa rarrabuwa da yawa.

SortLocaleUnknown.title: Ba a Yi Nasara ba
SortLocaleUnknown.message: Ba za a iya tantance dalilin da ya sa tsarin ya gaza ba.

ColumnModeTip.title: Tukwici Yanayin Rukunin
ColumnModeTip.message:
Akwai hanyoyi 3 don canzawa zuwa yanayin zaɓin shafi:
1. (Keyboard da Mouse) Rike Alt yayin da kake latsa hagu
2. (Allon madannai kaɗai) Riƙe Alt+ Shift yayin amfani da maɓallin kibiya
3. (Keyboard ko Mouse) Sanya kulawa a farkon farkon toshe ginshiƙi, sannan aiwatar da "Fara/Ƙarshen Zaɓi a Yanayin Rukunin" umurnin; Matsar da kulawa zuwa ƙarshen da ake so na matsayin toshe ginshiƙi, sannan sake aiwatar da "Fara/Ƙarshen Zaɓi a Yanayin Rukunin" kuma

BufferInvalidWarning.title: Ajiye kasa
BufferInvalidWarning.message: Ba za a iya ajiyewa: Buffer ba daidai ba ne.

DoCloseOrNot.title: Ajiye fayil ɗin da ba ya wanzu
DoCloseOrNot.message: Fayil "$STR_REPLACE$" babu kuma. A ajiye wannan fayil ɗin a cikin edita?

DoDeleteOrNot.title: Share fayil
DoDeleteOrNot.message: Fayil ɗin "$STR_REPLACE$" za a matsar da shi zuwa Maimaita Binta kuma wannan takarda za a rufe. Ci gaba?

NoBackupDoSaveFile.title: Ajiye
NoBackupDoSaveFile.message: Ba za a iya samun fayil ɗin ajiyar ku ba (an share daga waje). Ajiye shi in ba haka ba za a rasa bayanan ku Kuna son adana fayil "$STR_REPLACE$"?

DoReloadOrNot.title: Sake saukewa
DoReloadOrNot.message:
"$STR_REPLACE$"
Wani shirin ya canza wannan fayil ɗin. Kuna son sake loda shi?

DoReloadOrNotAndLooseChange.title: Sake saukewa
DoReloadOrNotAndLooseChange.message:
"$STR_REPLACE$"
Wani shirin ya canza wannan fayil ɗin. Kuna so ku sake loda shi kuma ku rasa sauye-sauyen da aka yi a Nextpad++?

PrehistoricSystemDetected.title: An gano tsarin tarihi na tarihi
PrehistoricSystemDetected.message: Da alama har yanzu kuna amfani da tsarin kafin tarihi.Wannan fasalin yana aiki ne kawai akan tsarin zamani, hakuri.

XpUpdaterProblem.title: Nextpad++ Updater
XpUpdaterProblem.message: Sabunta Nextpad++ bai dace da XP ba saboda tsayayyen Layer tsaro a ƙarƙashin XP. Kuna son zuwa shafin Nextpad++ don saukar da sabon sigar?

GUpProxyConfNeedAdminMode.title: Saitunan wakili
GUpProxyConfNeedAdminMode.message: Da fatan za a sake kunna Nextpad++ a cikin yanayin Admin don saita wakili.

DocTooDirtyToMonitor.title: Matsalar sa ido
DocTooDirtyToMonitor.message: Takardar ta datti.Da fatan za a ajiye gyaran kafin saka idanu.

DocNoExistToMonitor.title: Matsalar sa ido
DocNoExistToMonitor.message: Ya kamata fayil ɗin ya wanzu don a sa ido.

FileTooBigToOpen.title: Matsalar girman fayil
FileTooBigToOpen.message: Fayil ya yi girma da yawa don buɗe shi ta Nextpad++

FileLoadingException.title: Lambar keɓaɓɓen: $STR_REPLACE$
FileLoadingException.message: An sami kuskure yayin loda fayil ɗin!

WantToOpenHugeFile.title: Bude katon fayil gargadi
WantToOpenHugeFile.message: Bude babban fayil na 2GB+ na iya ɗaukar mintuna da yawa. Kuna son bude shi?

CreateNewFileError.title: Ƙirƙiri sabon fayil
CreateNewFileError.message: Ba za a iya ƙirƙirar fayil ɗin "$STR_REPLACE$" ba.

OpenFileError.title: KUSKURE
OpenFileError.message: Ba za a iya buɗe fayil "$STR_REPLACE$" ba.

OpenFileNoFolderError.title: Ba za a iya buɗe fayil
OpenFileNoFolderError.message: Ba za a iya buɗe "$STR_REPLACE1$" ba: Jakar "$STR_REPLACE2$" babu shi.

FileBackupFailed.title: Ajiyayyen Fayil ya kasa
FileBackupFailed.message:
Ba za a iya adana sigar fayil ɗin da ta gabata ba cikin kundin adireshin ajiya a "$STR_REPLACE$".
Shin kuna son adana fayil ɗin na yanzu ko ta yaya?

LoadLangsFailed.title: Configurator
LoadLangsFailed.message: Load langs.xml ya kasa! Kuna so ku dawo da langs.xml naku?

FolderAsWorspaceSubfolderExists.title: Jaka azaman Wurin aiki yana ƙara matsalar babban fayil
FolderAsWorspaceSubfolderExists.message: Akwai ƙaramin babban fayil ɗin babban fayil ɗin da kake son ƙarawa. Da fatan za a cire tushen sa daga rukunin kafin ku ƙara babban fayil "$STR_REPLACE$".

ProjectPanelChanged.title: $STR_REPLACE$
ProjectPanelChanged.message: An gyara filin aiki.Kuna so ku ajiye shi?

ProjectPanelSaveError.title: $STR_REPLACE$
ProjectPanelSaveError.message: An sami kuskure yayin rubuta fayil ɗin filin aikin ku. Ba a adana filin aikin ku ba.

ProjectPanelOpenDoSaveDirtyWsOrNot.title: Bude Wurin Aiki
ProjectPanelOpenDoSaveDirtyWsOrNot.message: An gyara filin aiki na yanzu.Kuna so ku ajiye aikin na yanzu?

ProjectPanelNewDoSaveDirtyWsOrNot.title: Sabon Wurin Aiki
ProjectPanelNewDoSaveDirtyWsOrNot.message: An gyara filin aiki na yanzu.Kuna so ku ajiye aikin na yanzu?

ProjectPanelOpenFailed.title: Bude Wurin Aiki
ProjectPanelOpenFailed.message: Ba a iya buɗe filin aiki ba. Da alama fayil ɗin da zai buɗe ba ingantaccen fayil ɗin aikin bane.

ProjectPanelRemoveFolderFromProject.title: Cire babban fayil daga aikin
ProjectPanelRemoveFolderFromProject.message: Za a cire duk ƙananan abubuwan. Shin kun tabbata kuna son cire wannan babban fayil ɗin daga aikin?

ProjectPanelRemoveFileFromProject.title: Cire fayil daga aikin
ProjectPanelRemoveFileFromProject.message: Shin kun tabbata kuna son cire wannan fayil ɗin daga aikin?

ProjectPanelReloadError.title: Sake Sanya Wurin Aiki
ProjectPanelReloadError.message: Ba za a iya samun fayil ɗin da za a sake lodawa ba.

ProjectPanelReloadDirty.title: Sake Sanya Wurin Aiki
ProjectPanelReloadDirty.message: An gyara filin aiki na yanzu.Sake lodi zai watsar da duk gyare-gyare. Kuna so ku ci gaba?

UDLNewNameError.title: Kuskuren UDL
UDLNewNameError.message: Ana amfani da wannan sunan ta wani harshe, don Allah a ba da wani.

UDL_importSuccessful.title: Harshen Ƙa'idar Mai Amfani
UDL_importSuccessful.message: An yi nasarar shigo da shi.

UDL_saveBeforeImport.title: Harshen Ƙa'idar Mai Amfani
UDL_saveBeforeImport.message: Kafin fitarwa, adana ma'anar yaren ku ta danna "Ajiye As..." maballin.

SCMapperDoDeleteOrNot.title: Ka tabbata?
SCMapperDoDeleteOrNot.message: Shin kun tabbata kuna son share wannan gajeriyar hanya?

OpenInAdminMode.title: Ajiye kasa
OpenInAdminMode.message: Ba za a iya ajiye fayil ɗin ba kuma ana iya kiyaye shi. Shin kuna son ƙaddamar da Nextpad++ a cikin yanayin Gudanarwa?

OpenInAdminModeWithoutCloseCurrent.title: Ajiye kasa
OpenInAdminModeWithoutCloseCurrent.message: Ba za a iya ajiye fayil ɗin ba kuma ana iya kiyaye shi. Shin kuna son ƙaddamar da Nextpad++ a cikin yanayin Gudanarwa?

OpenInAdminModeFailed.title: Bude a Yanayin Gudanarwa ya kasa
OpenInAdminModeFailed.message: Ba za a iya buɗe faifan rubutu ++ a yanayin Mai gudanarwa ba.

ViewInBrowser.title: Duba Fayil na Yanzu a cikin Mai Binciken Bincike
ViewInBrowser.message: Ba za a iya samun aikace-aikacen a cikin tsarin ku ba.

ExitToUpdatePlugins.title: Nextpad++ yana shirin fita
ExitToUpdatePlugins.message: Idan ka danna YES, za ka bar Nextpad++ don ci gaba da ayyukan. Nextpad++ za a sake farawa bayan an ƙare duk ayyukan. Ci gaba?

NeedToRestartToLoadPlugins.title: Nextpad++ yana buƙatar sake buɗewa
NeedToRestartToLoadPlugins.message: Dole ne ku sake kunna Nextpad++ don loda plugins ɗin da kuka shigar.

ChangeHistoryEnabledWarning.title: Nextpad++ yana buƙatar sake buɗewa
ChangeHistoryEnabledWarning.message: Dole ne ku sake kunna Nextpad++ don kunna Canja Tarihi.

WindowsSessionExit.title: Nextpad++ - Fitar zaman Windows
WindowsSessionExit.message: Za a ƙare zaman Windows amma kuna da wasu bayanan da ba a adana su ba.Shin kuna son fita Nextpad++ yanzu?

LanguageMenuCompactWarning.title: Karamin Menu na Harshe
LanguageMenuCompactWarning.message: Za a canza wannan zaɓi a ƙaddamarwa na gaba.

SwitchUnsavedThemeWarning.title: $STR_REPLACE$
SwitchUnsavedThemeWarning.message: Canje-canjen da ba a ajiye su na gab da yin watsi da su! Kuna so ku adana canje-canjenku kafin canza jigogi?

MacroAndRunCmdlWarning.title: Macro da Gudun Dokokin Daidaitawa
MacroAndRunCmdlWarning.message:
Dokokin Macro da Run da aka adana a cikin Nextpad++ v.8.5.2 (ko mafi girma) ƙila ba su dace da sigar Nextpad++ na yanzu ba. Da fatan za a gwada waɗannan umarni kuma, idan an buƙata, sake gyara su.
A madadin, zaku iya rage darajar zuwa Nextpad++ v8.5.2 kuma ku dawo da bayanan ku na baya. Nextpad++ zai ajiye tsoffin "shortcuts.xml" kuma ya adana shi azaman "shortcuts.xml.v8.5.2.backup". Sake suna "shortcuts.xml.v8.5.2.backup" -> "shortcuts.xml", ya kamata a dawo da umarninku kuma suyi aiki yadda ya kamata.

FullReadOnlySavingForbidden.title: Ajiye kasa
FullReadOnlySavingForbidden.message: Ba za a iya ajiye fayil ba. Cikakken bayanin kula ++ yanayin da aka hana adanawa kawai ya hana ajiye fayil ɗin.

NotEnoughRoom4Saving.title: Ajiye ya kasa
NotEnoughRoom4Saving.message: An kasa ajiye fayil Da alama babu isasshen sarari akan faifai don adana fayil.Ba a adana fayil ɗin ku ba.

FileInaccessibleUserSession.title: Ba a iya samun fayil
FileInaccessibleUserSession.message:
Wasu fayiloli daga zaman da aka adana da hannu "$STR_REPLACE$" ba su da samuwa.Ana iya buɗe su a matsayin fanko da takaddun karatu kawai azaman masu riƙe da wuri.
Kuna so ku ƙirƙiri waɗannan masu riƙewa?
NOTE: Zaɓin kar a ƙirƙiri masu riƙe wuri ko rufe su daga baya, ba za a canza zaman ku da hannu ba yayin fita.

FileInaccessibleDefaultSessionXml.title: Ba a iya samun fayil
FileInaccessibleDefaultSessionXml.message:
Wasu fayiloli daga zaman ku na baya ba su iya shiga.Ana iya buɗe su a matsayin fanko da takaddun karatu kawai azaman masu riƙe da wuri.
Kuna so ku ƙirƙiri waɗannan masu riƙewa?
NOTE: Zaɓin kar a ƙirƙiri masu riƙewa ko rufe su daga baya, ZA'A GYARA zaman ku KAN FITA!Muna ba da shawarar ku ajiye "session.xml" ɗinku yanzu.

RTLvsDirectWrite.title: Ba za a iya gudu RTL
RTLvsDirectWrite.message: RTL bai dace da yanayin DirectWrite ba.Da fatan za a kashe yanayin DirectWrite a MISC.sashe na maganganun Preferences, kuma sake kunna Nextpad++.

FileMemoryAllocationFailed.title: Banda: Rarraba ƙwaƙwalwar ajiyar fayil ya gaza
FileMemoryAllocationFailed.message: Wataƙila babu isassun ƙwaƙwalwar ajiyar kyauta don fayil ɗin da Nextpad++ ke lodawa.

FindRegexBackwardDisabled.title: An kashe bincike na baya na Regex
FindRegexBackwardDisabled.message:
Ta hanyar tsoho, an kashe binciken regex na baya saboda yiwuwar sakamakon da ba a zata ba.Don yin bincike na baya, buɗe maganganun Nemo kuma zaɓi ko dai yanayin bincike na al'ada ko tsawo maimakon magana ta yau da kullun. Danna maɓallin Ok don buɗe maganganun Nemo ko saita mayar da hankali akansa.
Idan kuna buƙatar fasalin neman regex na baya, tuntuɓi littafin mai amfani don umarni kan kunna shi.

PrintError.message: Ba za a iya fara daftarin aiki firinta ba.

FindAutoChangeOfInSelectionWarning.title: Neman gargadi
FindAutoChangeOfInSelectionWarning.message: Yanayin akwatin "A zaɓi" an canza ta atomatik. Da fatan za a tabbatar da yanayin bincike kafin yin aikin.

Need2Restart2ShowMenuShortcuts.title: Nextpad++ yana buƙatar sake kunnawa
Need2Restart2ShowMenuShortcuts.message: Nextpad++ yana buƙatar sake kunnawa don nuna gajerun hanyoyin menu na dama.

NoAdminRight2ChangeReadOnlyFileAttribute.title: Canza fasalin karatun fayil kawai ya kasa
NoAdminRight2ChangeReadOnlyFileAttribute.message: Da fatan za a gudanar da Nextpad++ azaman mai gudanarwa don canza halayen fayil.

PreferencesInitialSort.name: Tsara Ayyuka (A zuwa Z) ta tsohuwa

SelectFolderFromBrowserString.name: Zaɓi babban fayil don ƙarawa a cikin Jaka azaman Panel Aiki

word-chars-list-tip.value: Wannan yana ba ku damar haɗa ƙarin haruffa cikin haruffan kalmomin yanzu yayin danna sau biyu don zaɓi ko bincika tare da zaɓin "Match gaba ɗaya kalma kawai" zaɓi.

eol-custom-color-tip.value: Je zuwa Salon Configurator don canza tsohuwar launi ta al'ada ta EOL ("launi na al'ada EOL")..

backup-select-folder.value: Zaɓi babban fayil azaman madadin adireshi

cloud-restart-warning.value: Da fatan za a sake kunna Nextpad++ don fara aiki.

cloud-select-folder.value: Zaɓi babban fayil daga/zuwa inda Nextpad++ ke karantawa/ rubuta saitunan sa

default-open-save-select-folder.value: Zaɓi babban fayil azaman tsoho directory

shift-change-direction-tip.value: Yi amfani da Shift+Enter don bincika akasin shugabanci

find-in-files-filter-tip.value:
Nemo cikin cpp, cxx, h, hxx hpp: *.cpp *.cxx *.h *.hxx *.hpp
Nemo cikin duk fayiloli banda exe, obj log: *.* !*.exe !*.obj !*.log
Nemo cikin duk fayiloli amma ban da gwaje-gwajen manyan fayiloli, bin bin64: *.* !\ gwaje-gwaje !\bin*
Nemo cikin duk fayiloli amma a ware duk log ɗin manyan fayiloli ko rajistan ayyukan akai-akai: *.* !+\log*

find-in-files-select-folder.value: Zaɓi babban fayil don bincika daga

find-in-files-dir-from-active-doc-tip.value: Cika filin Directory bisa aiki mai aiki

find-status-top-reached.value: Nemo: Daftarin aiki da aka fara farawa, farkon abin da ya faru daga ƙasa ya samo.

find-status-end-reached.value: Nemo: Ƙarshen daftarin aiki, abin da ya faru na farko daga saman da aka samo.

find-status-replaceinfiles-1-replaced.value: Sauya a cikin Fayiloli: An maye gurbin abin da ya faru 1

find-status-replaceinfiles-nb-replaced.value: Sauya a cikin Fayiloli: An maye gurbin abubuwan da suka faru $INT_REPLACE$

find-status-replaceinopenedfiles-1-repla.value: Sauya a Buɗe Fayilolin: An maye gurbin abin da ya faru 1

find-status-replaceinopenedfiles-nb-repl.value: Sauya a Buɗe Fayilolin: $INT_REPLACE$ an maye gurbin abubuwan da suka faru

find-status-invalid-re.value: Nemo: Magana na yau da kullun mara inganci

find-status-replaceall-1-replaced.value: Sauya Duk: An maye gurbin abin da ya faru 1

find-status-replaceall-nb-replaced.value: Sauya Duk: An maye gurbin abubuwan da suka faru $INT_REPLACE$

find-status-replaceall-readonly.value: Sauya Duk: Ba za a iya maye gurbin rubutu ba.Daftarin aiki na yanzu ana karantawa kawai

find-status-replace-end-reached.value: Sauya: Ƙarshen takaddar da aka kai, an fara daga sama.

find-status-replace-top-reached.value: Sauya: Takaddun da aka kai farawa, farawa daga ƙasa.

find-status-replaced-next-found.value: Sauya: An maye gurbin abin da ya faru 1.An samo abin da ya faru na gaba.

find-status-replaced-without-continuing.value: Sauya: An maye gurbin abin da ya faru 1.

find-status-replaced-next-not-found.value: Sauya: An maye gurbin abin da ya faru 1.Ba a sake samun wasu abubuwan da suka faru ba.

find-status-replace-not-found.value: Sauya: ba a sami abin da ya faru ba

find-status-replace-readonly.value: Sauya: Ba za a iya maye gurbin rubutu ba.Daftarin aiki na yanzu ana karantawa kawai

find-status-cannot-find.value: Nemo: Ba a iya samun rubutun "$STR_REPLACE$"

find-status-cannot-find-pebkac-maybe.value: Ba za a iya samun abin da ya faru ba.Wataƙila kun manta don duba "Kunnade" (zuwa ON), "Match case" (zuwa KASHE), ko "Match gaba ɗaya kalma kawai" (zuwa KASHE).

find-status-invisible-chars-findWhat.value: Haruffa marasa ganuwa a cikin manna "Nemi me" ko "Maye gurbinsu da" abun ciki

find-status-invisible-chars-findWhat-tip.value: Gargaɗi: Haruffa marasa ganuwa a filin nema (ko maye gurbin). Rubutun da aka liƙa a cikin wannan filin ya haɗa da haruffa marasa ganuwa (wataƙila masu ƙare layi).Idan kun ci gaba ba tare da share su ba, za a haɗa su a cikin rubutun bincike (ko maye gurbin).

finder-find-in-finder.value: Nemo a cikin waɗannan sakamakon binciken...

finder-copy-selected-paths.value: Kwafi Sunan Tafarki (s) da aka zaɓa

userdefined-title-save.value: Ajiye Sunan Harshen Yanzu Kamar yadda...

summary-nbchar.value: Haruffa (ba tare da ƙarewar layi ba):

progress-cancel-info.value: Soke aiki, da fatan za a jira...

replace-in-files-confirm-directory.value: Shin kun tabbata kuna son maye gurbin duk abubuwan da suka faru a cikin:

replace-in-projects-confirm-message.value: Kuna son maye gurbin duk abubuwan da suka faru a cikin duk takaddun da ke cikin zaɓaɓɓun Panel(s) na Ayyukan?

replace-in-open-docs-confirm-message.value: Shin kun tabbata kuna son maye gurbin duk abubuwan da suka faru a duk buɗaɗɗen takardu?

find-result-title-info.value: ($INT_REPLACE1$ ya buge a cikin $INT_REPLACE2$ fayilolin $INT_REPLACE3$ da aka nema)

find-result-title-info-selections.value: ($INT_REPLACE1$ ya buge a cikin $INT_REPLACE2$ zaɓin $INT_REPLACE3$ aka nema)

find-result-title-info-extra.value: - Yanayin Tacewar Layi: kawai nuna sakamakon da aka tace

IncrementalFind-FSTopReached.value: Ya kai saman shafi, ya ci gaba daga kasa

IncrementalFind-FSEndReached.value: An kai ƙarshen shafi, ci gaba daga sama

contextMenu-styleAlloccurrencesOfToken.value: Salon duk abubuwan da suka faru na alama

largeFileRestriction-tip.value:
Wasu fasalulluka na iya rage aiki a manyan fayiloli.Ana iya kashe waɗannan fasalulluka ta atomatik akan buɗe babban fayil.Kuna iya keɓance su anan.
NOTE: 1. Gyara zaɓuɓɓuka a nan yana buƙatar sake buɗe manyan fayiloli a halin yanzu don samun halayen da suka dace.
2. Idan aka duba "Deactivate Word Wrap a duniya" kuma ka bude babban fayil, "Word Wrap" za a kashe duk fayiloli.Kuna iya sake kunna ta ta hanyar menu "Duba-> Kundin Kalma".

npcNote-tip.value:
Wakilin zaɓaɓɓen "marasa ASCII" fararen sararin samaniya da haruffa marasa bugu ( sarrafawa).
NOTE: Yin amfani da wakilci zai kashe tasirin haruffa akan rubutu.
Don cikakken jerin zaɓaɓɓun sararin sarari da haruffa marasa bugu duba Jagorar mai amfani.
Danna kan wannan maɓallin don buɗe gidan yanar gizon tare da littafin mai amfani.

npcAbbreviation-tip.value:
Gaggawa : suna NBSP: sarari babu hutu ZWSP: sarari sifili ZWNBSP: sarari mara fa'ida-sifili
Don cikakken lissafin duba Jagoran mai amfani. Danna kan "?"maballin dama don buɗe gidan yanar gizon tare da littafin mai amfani.

npcCodepoint-tip.value:
Codepoint: suna U+00A0: sarari babu hutu U+200B: sarari sifili U+FEFF : Sifili-nisa ba-karye sarari
Don cikakken lissafin duba Jagoran mai amfani. Danna kan "?"maballin dama don buɗe gidan yanar gizon tare da littafin mai amfani.

npcCustomColor-tip.value: Je zuwa Salon Configurator don canza tsoffin launi na al'ada don zaɓin farar wuri da haruffa marasa bugawa ("Launi na al'ada na haruffa marasa bugawa").

npcIncludeCcUniEol-tip.value: Aiwatar da saitunan bayyanar haruffa marasa bugawa zuwa C0, sarrafawar C1 da Unicode EOL (layi na gaba, mai raba layi da mai raba sakin layi).

searchingInSelThresh-tip.value: Mafi ƙarancin adadin haruffan da aka zaɓa a yankin gyara don bincika akwatin rajista ta atomatik lokacin da aka kunna Nemo maganganu.Matsakaicin ƙimar shine $INT_REPLACE$.Saita ƙima zuwa 0 don kashe dubawa ta atomatik.

searchingFillFindWhat-tip.value: Matsakaicin adadin haruffan da aka zaɓa a yankin gyara don cike filin "Nemi menene" ta atomatik lokacin da aka kunna Ctrl-F.Matsakaicin ƙimar shine $INT_REPLACE$, wanda shine matsakaicin girman filin "Nemi menene", tsarin iyaka.

verticalEdge-tip.value: Ƙara alamar shafi ta hanyar nuna matsayinsa tare da lamba goma.Kuna iya ayyana alamomin shafi da yawa ta amfani da farin sarari don raba lambobi daban-daban.

fileSaveAsCopySaveButton-tip.value: Riƙe Shift yayin latsa Ajiye don buɗe kwafin bayan ajiyewa.

autoIndentBasic-tip.value: Tabbatar cewa shigar da layin na yanzu (watau sabon layin da aka ƙirƙira ta latsa maɓallin ENTER) yayi daidai da shigar layin da ya gabata.

autoIndentAdvanced-tip.value:
Kunna shigar da wayo don harsuna "C-like" da Python.Harsunan "C-like" sun haɗa da: C, C++, Java, C#, Objective-C, PHP, JavaScript, JSP, CSS, Perl, Rust, PowerShell da JSON.
Idan ka zaɓi yanayin ci gaba amma ba ka gyara fayiloli a cikin yarukan da aka ambata ba, shigarwar za ta kasance a cikin ainihin yanayin.

global-override-tip.value: Ƙaddamar da "Global override" a nan zai ƙetare wannan siga a duk salon harshe.Abinda da gaske kuke so shine amfani da saitunan "Default Style" maimakon

scintillaRenderingTechnology-tip.value: Yana iya inganta ma'anar haruffa na musamman ko warware wasu al'amurran da suka shafi zane, sake kunna Nextpad++ don amfani da canje-canje.

toolbar-accent-tip.value: Wannan zaɓi yana sa gumakan kayan aikin ku su bi launin lafazin tsarin Windows.Launin lafazi shine launi mai haske da ake amfani dashi a cikin maɓalli, iyakoki, da fale-falen menu na Fara a cikin Windows.Don canza shi, je zuwa Saituna > Keɓantawa > Launuka, sannan zaɓi launin lafazin da kuka fi so.

len-limit-exceeded-tip.value: Iyakar tsayi: shigarwar ku na iya wuce iyakar da aka yarda kuma ana iya yanke shi, kuma ba za a adana shi ba don zama na gaba.

max-len-on-search-tip.value: Shigar da shigar ku na iya wuce iyakar da aka yarda kuma ana iya yanke shi, kuma ba za a adana shi ba don zama na gaba.

max-len-on-save-tip.value: Tsawon shigarwar ku yana da tsayi sosai kuma maiyuwa ba za a adana shi don zama na gaba ba.

tabbar-tabcompactlabellen-tip.value: Yana iyakance tsayin bayyane na dogon sunaye shafin.Shigar don amfani da ƙimar da aka bayar.Kewayon ƙimar: 1-257 haruffa (0 yana hana yanke).
